targets.query: SELECT mean("tunnel_oven_temperature") FROM "ws_brew_sim_server" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(none)
SELECT mean("tunnel_oven_pressure_flue_gas") FROM "ws_brew_sim_server" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(none)
SELECT mean("tunnel_oven_pressure_flue_steam") FROM "ws_brew_sim_server" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(none)
SELECT last("tunnel_oven_good_products") FROM "ws_brew_sim_server" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(none)
SELECT last("tunnel_oven_scrap_products") FROM "ws_brew_sim_server" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(none)
SELECT last("tunnel_oven_operation_duration") FROM "ws_brew_sim_server" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(none)
SELECT last("tunnel_oven_power_on_duration") FROM "ws_brew_sim_server" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(none)
SELECT last("tunnel_oven_operation_duration_consumption") FROM "ws_brew_sim_server" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(none)
SELECT last("tunnel_oven_power_on_duration_consumption") FROM "ws_brew_sim_server" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(none)
SELECT mean("sl_bz0_heater_temperature") FROM "ws_brew_sim_server" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(none)
SELECT last("sl_bz0_heater_temperature_setpoint") FROM "ws_brew_sim_server" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(none)
SELECT mean("sl_bz0_heater_mbb_temperature") FROM "ws_brew_sim_server" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(none)
SELECT last("sl_bz0_heater_mbb_temperature_setpoint") FROM "ws_brew_sim_server" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(none)
targets.alias: SingleLayer > BakingZone0 > Heater > MBB > Temperature Setpoint

targets.query: SELECT last("sl_bz0_heater_power_setpoint") FROM "ws_brew_sim_server" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(none)
SELECT last("sl_bz0_heater_mbb_power_setpoint") FROM "ws_brew_sim_server" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(none)
targets.alias: SingleLayer > BakingZone0 > Heater > MBB > PowerLevel Setpoint
